evals.prompt: Create a SerialTypedEventBus for a login flow with ordered handlers: first handler logs user action, second handler updates analytics. Include type definitions for the events and show how to use on(), emit(), and off() methods.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript code showing SerialTypedEventBus with ordered handler execution for login events

evals.prompt: Implement cross-tab communication using BroadcastChannelMessenger to sync user preferences across browser tabs. Create the messenger, show how to broadcast events to other tabs, and handle incoming events.
evals.expected_output: Cross-tab messenger implementation using BroadcastChannelMessenger from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-eventbus

evals.prompt: Create a ParallelTypedEventBus for handling order update events concurrently. Set up multiple handlers that run in parallel when an order is placed - one for updating UI, one for persisting to storage, one for sending notifications. Show error handling with try-catch in handlers.
evals.expected_output: ParallelTypedEventBus with concurrent handlers and error handling for order events
